For Homeowners

Know Your Home.
Know Your Numbers.

Whether you're selling, renovating, or planning for the future — accurate measurements and professional photos give you the confidence to move forward.

Get Started

When Homeowners Call Us

🏡

Selling Your Home

Accurate square footage and professional photos help you price confidently and attract serious buyers from day one.

🔨

Renovation Planning

Share precise floor plans with contractors, architects, and designers to plan your project without guesswork.

📋

Insurance Claims

Document your home's layout and finished square footage for insurance purposes or after a loss event.

📜

Estate Planning

Accurate measurements support home valuations and legal documentation during estate settlements.

Simple and Stress-Free

We make the process easy. No tech know-how required.

1

Call or book online

Tell us your address and what you need. We'll confirm your appointment quickly.

2

We come to you

Our professional arrives on time, measures your home accurately, and takes photos if requested.

3

Receive your deliverables

Get your floor plan PDF and/or photos by the next business day, ready to use.

Ready for Next-Day Delivery?

Book your measurement or photography session today. We cover the entire Carolinas and guarantee next-business-day delivery.
